message:
feat: add folder download as zip using libdeflate

- New zip.zig module creates ZIP files using libdeflate for compression
- Reuses existing libdeflate (no new dependencies, just added crc32.c)
- Server handler: 0x14 folder_download -> 0x15 folder.zip response
- Client auto-detects folder (path ending with /) vs file download
- ZIP format: local headers + DEFLATE data + central directory
